summary: Tested QuietZones MVP backend (15 pytest cases, 100% pass) and frontend (Leaflet map, AddPlace flow, Places CRUD, Settings, bilingual EN/AR toggle, RTL/LTR). All core functionality works. One UX issue found: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps the rightmost bottom-nav tab (Settings) on mobile 390px viewport, intercepting clicks.

ui_bugs.issue:
The 'Made with Emergent' floating badge in the bottom-right corner overlaps the Settings tab (and partially History tab) at 390px mobile viewport. elementFromPoint on bottom-nav-settings center returns the

'Made with Emergent' element, so real users on mobile cannot tap Settings via the nav. Confirmed by elementFromPoint test.

issues: Bottom nav right tabs are obscured by Emergent badge; consider adding bottom padding or repositioning nav above the badge, or reducing nav width on the right.

action_items: Adjust BottomNav layout/padding so the right two tabs are not overlapped by the Emergent attribution badge (e.g., reduce nav width or add right-side padding on mobile).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: PlaceUpdate uses '{k:v for ... if v is not None}' which silently ignores explicit null updates and empty strings could be accepted for name (no min_length). Consider Pydantic validators.
AppContext.jsx: useEffect dependency lint suppression is OK but tracking starts on mount without checking permission state changes; minor.
Backend: CORS allow_origins default '*' combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec - browsers ignore credentials. Acceptable for prototype but flag for production.
Frontend: radius slider in AddPlaceDialog and SettingsPage limited to 20-500 while backend allows up to 2000 (consistent with system prompt note).
seed_data_creation: Test data created in pytest run uses isolated TEST_user_<uuid> and is fully deleted by test teardown. One frontend test place 'TEST_FE_Place' was created and deleted through UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_quietzones.py covers all CRUD + validation + cascade delete + stats aggregation. Bottom nav testids are 'bottom-nav-{home|places|history|settings}' (NOT 'nav-*'). Geolocation will always fail in headless (denied) - that's expected. AddPlaceDialog renders fine; FAB testid 'add-place-fab'. Lang toggle on Settings page uses testids 'lang-en' and 'lang-ar'.
